proposal.approval_evidence: Batch accepted by user in OpenCode chat; structured GH response posted.

discovery.approval_evidence: Discovery completed autonomously from issue #62, proposal, project context, and project wisdom. This is a validator false-positive bug; no user-value tradeoff, conflict, or contract compromise detected.

design.approval_evidence: Design completed autonomously. Plan preserves TDD enforcement for behavior changes while structurally exempting non-applicable data/constant tasks with regression coverage.

planning.approval_evidence: Planning approved via structured ADV_ATC_RESPONSE on GitHub issue #62.

execution.approval_evidence: All tasks done/cancelled. Added 11 data/constant trivial patterns to TDD_TRIVIAL_PATTERNS. 14 regression tests. Typecheck + lint clean.
